title: Looking for monday.com builder for digital marketing agency
excerpt:
Hello, 
I am looking for someone that can build workflows for our digital agency. In particular I am looking for someone to create a process for our operations and account manager team from scratch inside monday.com We k…

posts.author: danspottsville (Dan Spottsville)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am looking for someone that can build workflows for our digital agency. In particular I am looking for someone to create a process for our operations and account manager team from scratch inside monday.com We know the process. We need someone to be able to take our current process and build it inside monday.com

Please reach out to me here and my email (dspottsville@valyntdigital.com) Project is needing to start ASAP and be completed in two to three weeks.

posts.author: Rishabh (Rishabh )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @danspottsville

I sent you an email via RIshabh@plaxonic.com, Kindly check.?

Best Regards,
Rishabh

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @danspottsville,

We’ve emailed direct - You mentioned you have the process mapped out and you just need someone to build it in – completion time frame around 2-3 weeks.

Any chance you can send through an outline of the process? We’ll be able to give you an approximate quote and a timeframe from that, from there we can ascertain if it’s worth your time to jump on a call and get the specific details in.

Let me know how that sounds for you, if you’d prefer just to book straight in and discuss; do that here.

teameasy@easy-mondays.com
Easy Mondays

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @danspottsville !

Welcome to the monday com community!

monday. com is indeed a great tool for project management. It allows enterprises to integrate their CRM solutions with it for effective lead management. Since you already created multiple boards within monday com to manage the project and looking for someone who can help you with the existing structure, I would recommend you get in touch with certified monday.com consultants for designing a better structure for project management.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com

posts.author: Teluxora (Teluxora)
posts.cookedHtml: I had to do something similar once, and I worked with someone who took the process I already had and set it up so everything flowed smoothly—like one step naturally leading to the next.

posts.author: Teluxora (Teluxora)
posts.cookedHtml: If you’re looking for someone to help with that, you might want to check out elitesolutionsdigital. They’re solid at taking what you’ve got and building workflows that actually work for your team.

posts.author: michael5 (michael)
posts.cookedHtml: If you’re looking for a monday.com builder for a digital marketing agency, I can share my personal experience with Hikemytraffic®. They helped set up and customize monday.com workflows customized to our marketing projects, making task management much easier and more organized. Their team understood our specific needs and built boards that tracked everything from campaign planning to client reporting smoothly.
